title: Reranking: cross-encoders, Cohere/BGE rerank, MMR
focus: Bi-encoder retrieve + cross-encoder rerank — the two-stage pattern.

items.label: Bi-encoder (retrieve) vs cross-encoder (rerank)
interviewQuestions: Why is a cross-encoder more accurate than a bi-encoder, and why can't we use it for retrieval?
What's the latency cost of cross-encoder reranking, and how do you keep it under your budget?

items.label: Cohere Rerank, BGE Rerank, monoT5
interviewQuestions: When does adding a reranker actually move the needle?
Compare hosted (Cohere) vs self-hosted (BGE / monoT5) rerankers — when would you pick each?

items.label: MMR & diversity reranking
interviewQuestions: What is MMR, and why does diversity matter in retrieved context?
How would you tune the MMR diversity λ — what does the user actually feel as it changes?
